records.Description: From thrilling matches and team spirit 🏏 to cheering, laughter, and unforgettable last-ball moments — it was a day full of excitement, bonding, and amazing vibes 🙌 We played with passion, shared memories, enjoyed refreshments, and made the tournament truly special 💛

From sharing smiles and joyful moments 🎈 to spreading learning, care, and happiness among children 💛 — it was a heartwarming Children’s Day celebration filled with love, bonding, and hope 🌈 Together, Nilgiri House, Sundarbans House, and Sahara Council created beautiful memories and reminded us that every child deserves support, joy, and a chance to dream 👧👦✨
From introduction to peaceful darshan in the vibes of temple then enjoying games and snacks
